description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, surrounded by a low fence and featuring a modest front yard with trees and shrubs. The house has a simple, modern design with clean lines and a neutral color palette, primarily beige and white, accented by green landscaping. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior walls, allowing for ample natural light inside. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessible via a paved path, and is marked by a small porch area. The backyard is enclosed and features additional greenery, providing privacy and outdoor space. The overall layout is compact and efficient, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, beige and white exterior, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved path, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat exterior wall, asymmetrical window placement, and a glimpse of the backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other long exterior wall, more windows, and the side yard area.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small porch, paved path, and minimal decorative elements
